en: There is a book on the table.
There is a big tree in the park.
There is an apple in the fridge.
There is a teacher in the classroom.
There is a cat in the garden.
There is no book on the table.
There is no milk in the fridge.
Is there a book on the table?
Yes, there is.
No, there is not.
There are thirty students in the classroom.
There are many trees in the park.

zh: 桌子上有两本书和一支笔。
en: There are two books and a pen on the table.
There are many cars in the street.
There are some eggs in the fridge.
There are no students in the classroom.
Are there any animals in the park?
Yes, there are.
No, there are not.
How many books are there on the table?

zh: 这个城市有很多博物馆。
en: There are many museums in this city.
There is a supermarket near the school.
There are forty students in our class.
There is a hospital in this street.
There are some flowers in the vase.
Once upon a time, there was a little girl.
Long ago, there was a dragon.

zh: 那个村子里有一百户人家。
en: There were one hundred families in that village.
There used to be a bridge here.

zh: 将来这里会有一所新学校。
en: There will be a new school here in the future.
